title: Skill Registry
description: Tracks installed skills and their remote availability from sources like LobeHub and GitHub

version.description: Schema version of this registry file

installed.description: List of skills currently installed in ~/.claude/skills/

available_remote.description: Total count of skills available from remote sources (informational, set after last sync)

last_sync.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last successful remote registry sync

InstalledSkill.title: InstalledSkill
InstalledSkill.description: A single skill entry, either locally authored or installed from a remote source

name.description: Unique skill identifier — matches the directory name under ~/.claude/skills/

path.description: Absolute path to the skill directory on disk

description.description: Short human-readable description of what the skill provides, read from SKILL.md frontmatter

source.description: Origin of this skill: authored locally, installed from LobeHub marketplace, or installed from a GitHub repo

source_url.description: Canonical URL to the upstream skill listing or repo (omitted for local skills)

version.description: Semver string of the installed skill version, if provided by the upstream source

tags.description: Keyword tags used for search filtering, read from SKILL.md frontmatter

installed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this skill was first installed

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this skill was last updated from its source
